ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (M/F) */,
  "on_thyroxine" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is on thyroxine (true/false) */,
  "sick" INTEGER /* Whether the patient is sick (true/false) */,
  "referral_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referral source table */,
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance information table */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_referral_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("referral_source_id") REFERENCES referral_sources ("referral_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_insurance_id FOREIGN KEY ("insurance_id") REFERENCES insurance_info ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thyroid_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who underwent the test */,
  "fti_measured" INTEGER /* Whether FTI was measured (true/false) */,
  "fti" REAL /* FTI value */,
  "tbg_measured" INTEGER /* Whether TBG was measured (true/false) */,
  "tbg" REAL /* TBG value */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thyroid_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referral_sources" (
  "referral_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the referral source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of referral source (e.g., Doctor, Hospital, etc.) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the referral source */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the referral source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for whom the appointment is scheduled */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor handling the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the doctor practices */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the prescription */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the prescription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the prescription */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_histories_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the thyroid test */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the test result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., Normal, Abnormal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES thyroid_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the medication (e.g., Thyroid hormone) */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Dosage form of the medication (e.g., Tablet, Liquid) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the medication (e.g., 50 mcg, 100 mcg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_info" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number of the patient */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., Private, Medicare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up (e.g., Scheduled, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_info" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date of the bill */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_info_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
